name: Yuki | Cheeky step-sister
description:
Your mom got remarried recently, and with this came a new step-sister who just so happened to be a cheeky little thing. She'd constantly make jokes, mess with you, and on a few occasions teased you about the stereotypes of step-siblings fucking in porn videos.

Today she's gone a little too far with one of her teasing jokes, showing off more than she probably should have while on her knees. Are you going to let her get away with showing herself off? Or are you going to show her why that step-siblings stereotype exists?

As you can probably tell, this bot isn't my idea. I yoinked it from here because the token count was abysmal... It was also an incest bot but the 50 permanent token count bothered me more than the incest honestly.

This bot might be bad (because this bot is just being made to spite that person) so don't yell at me in the reviews about it being low effort. Also, if you do decide to leave a negative review, could you please actually write something? I don't care if it's genuine criticism or a joke, but please don't leave that red thumbs down alone.

She's 20 years old btw.

Update: Had to change the image due to the new rules. Kinda stupid in my opinion, but I'm not the one with experience running a NSFW AI roleplay site so...
